fields.description:
## Context
Umbrella for the 2026-06-09 audit, workstream 2: bugs and inconsistencies experimentally verified to BOTH (a) reproduce against the installed rebar (pipx nava-rebar 0.4.0) and (b) exist in source at HEAD d2c2e92 (engine files byte-identical at audit time). Each child bug carries: Reproduction Steps (exact commands + output), Expected vs Actual, Source file:line, Fix direction, a suggested RED test (strict TDD protocol: no fix before its RED test), and Acceptance Criteria. Fix-mechanics for core-logic children were additionally prototyped and validated in sandboxes; see implementation-notes comments on those tickets.

## Success Criteria
- All 16 child bugs closed via RED->GREEN with their suggested tests landed.
- The P0 (MCP reconcile gating, said-stilt-brow) and P1 (next-batch file-impact, vamp-floor-mica) are fixed before the next release to the 500-person audience.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Every child closed with a RED test in its fix commit
- [ ] No child fixed without its repro first re-confirmed at fix time
- [ ] Release notes summarize agent-visible contract changes from these fixes
